changes.summary: Added CreatePublicationUseCase (BC-03) with execute() containing project postType validation, beneficiary checks, inv-07 source-entity lead gate for community-authored posts, inv-08 canCreatePublication when checkPermissions enabled, and inv-01 postCost processing (quota split + GLOBAL_COMMUNITY_ID wallet burn via WalletService, community-wallet funding path). Exposes createCreatePublicationUseCase factory.

PublicationService.createPublication delegates to CreatePublicationUseCase. Extended CreatePublicationDto with processPostCost and postCostFunding. Wired use case in constructor; optional CreatePublicationExecuteOptions for permission/post-cost toggles.

verification.tsc_changed_files: no errors filtered for changed paths

notes: processPostCost defaults false on PublicationService.createPublication to avoid double-charging while publications.router still performs interim postCost deduction; set processPostCost true (or pass options.processPostCost) to activate use-case fee path. checkPermissions defaults false on service entry because router uses checkPermissionInHandler; use case enforces inv-08 when checkPermissions is true. Router→use-case direct wiring and removal of duplicate router payment deferred to follow-up work units outside write_set.
